raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX unauthorized transactions occurred on my Citibank XXXX credit card : * XX/XX/year> {$570.00} * XX/XX/year> {$590.00} XXXX reported the fraud on XX/XX/XXXX, and XXXX initially issued temporary credits while investigating. I submitted my drivers license as requested and specifically asked that they obtain surveillance footage from XXXX. I was told this would be part of the investigation. 
However, on XX/XX/XXXX, I received a denial letter stating the charges were valid. A Citibank agent later acknowledged that multiple cards had been issued on my account and that the one used for the purchases may not have been in my possession supporting my fraud claim. Despite this, Citibank closed the case without obtaining key evidence from XXXX. 
This reflects a negligent investigation, and the disputed charges are now impacting my account. I am requesting CFPBs assistance to ensure the case is properly reviewed and resolved.
